reviews.text:
I am 20+ year veteran social worker in the field of protective services. I have worked with many family law firms in that time. I have never observed such unprofessional behavior as I have observed from this firm’s secretary. I’ve been party to two phone calls between the client and the secretary. The client was merely calling for case status update and clarification on paperwork, respectively. The secretary was immediately condescending and dismissive to the client. She would not allow the client to explain her confusion or concerns during either call. At one point she even told the client she needed to get a backbone and stop calling the firm about the concerns. She literally spoke to her as though she was a child. During the last phone call, the client was trying to ascertain some kind of proof from the court that the temporary restraining order had been dismissed to provide to the client’s child’s school, as the school has stated they need the proof to allow the client on campus. The secretary talked over the client stating nothing was needed as it was a temporary order. When I tried to explain to the client that they still need something showing the final outcome of the court proceedings,  the secretary began to speak at me rudely and hung up on the client. She was so condescending and rude, did not try to be helpful at all and I’m just bewildered by the behavior.
Do not recommend.

I hired Lane Heginbotham at Harris Law Office and my experience has been extremely disappointing. I paid $6,000 in advance, but my case was not handled with professionalism or care. Communication was poor, deadlines were missed, and no meaningful progress was made. Despite repeated attempts to get updates and results, I received little to nothing in return for the money I paid. In my opinion, this office takes advantage of clients and does not deliver the services promised. I strongly caution anyone considering hiring him—protect yourself and look for an attorney who is trustworthy and accountable.this is the second time I post this review

I hired Harris Law after my original attorney ghosted me. We had a custody case that started in Dec 2021 and didn't really start having any activity until July of 2024. When my attorney wouldn't respond I had to find a new law firm. After a long search ( I don't live in Bell County anymore) they were able to step in and take over. The staff was always very cordial and Mr. Lane Heginbotham was very helpful I really felt confident following his advice and guidance. There was times I felt overwhelmed becuase I was fighting for the safety of my child but he was reassuring and gave me the peace of mind I needed.

I hired Mr. Lane at Harris Law Firm in November 2021 to help me recover money owed by my ex-husband. I paid in full for his services. After almost four years, the only actions taken were two mediations, and my case has gone nowhere.

I’ve sent many emails that are often ignored or answered very late. I’ve also called the office multiple times, and I’m always told someone will call me back, but no one ever does.

I feel extremely disappointed and frustrated with how my case has been handled. I don't see an end in sight 😔
If you need a good attorney,  this is the place to go..

Same here they stole my money no refund lied to me and lied some more I found me a new lawyer got the work done with no problems same work they claim they couldn't do they a joke run 2 years no progress

I am appalled at the unethical lawyer I was "supposedly" a client of for 9 months who did absolutely NOTHING for me despite numerous phone calls. Lacked proper communication, nonetheless, lowest standards, and zero morals.

The biggest joke… I called every week for 6 months on a Will… the two girls couldn’t even keep their story straight in the office. One was saying he is working hard on my Will and the other one saying that he hasn’t had time to do it because he’s had other stuff going on, or he’s out of the country, or he has court, or he’s on the phone we will call you right back or I’ll have him call you. You never hear from nobody and when you call up there they get attitude, when they know something  they will let you know, six months later had to hire someone else they had it done in two days.. please do your own homework and beware…
DO NOT PLS, DO NOT GO HERE, THANK ME LATER. THEY WILL PUT OFF YOUR COURT DATE FOR 1 TO 2 YRS..FOR NO REASON, WILL TAKE YOUR MONEY, YOU WILL HAVE TO CALL THEM EVERY DAY TO CHECK UP ON YOUR CASE!

reviews.ownerResponse:
This review is from someone who was not our client. This reviewer was the respondent. While we are available to our clients for questions and/or concerns, our contact with a respondent is limited. There is only so many times that we will explain that our client retained us in an action against you and that you are the respondent. We also go further to explain that as the respondent, we cannot advise you and recommend hiring counsel to represent your interests and/or answer your questions.

We appreciate this reviewer's time to help us identify the separation between parties, and why it is important that you hire counsel to represent you, or to review and answer questions that you may have about documents that require your signature.

reviews.text:
I have nothing but praise for this law firm.
They are a team of professionals, knowledgeable, passionate, and dedicated to serving us. I originally applied for my disability in 2024 and like most people was denied, even though my medical records showed I'm disabled. I appealed and was denied again after my appeal.
I found Ted Smith through a close friend who since then got his approval after they took his case. One of the many qualities I love is that when I first approached them to consider taking my case, instead of taking it, they told me what to do, which was to apply on my own first but if it got denied, to then come see them. This shows it’s not all about the money because if I had gotten approved, they wouldn’t have gotten paid. After being denied the second time they got the ball rolling. Throughout the process, Carole, Crystal, and Ted encouraged and reassured me that not only was I at a good age, but my medical history looked good for approval. In 2025, they set a date for me to see the judge, and it was at this meeting that I got approved for my disability. I highly recommend Ted Smith and his amazing team, Carole and Crystal. Thank you for seeing me through this chapter of my life. Thank you for the warm atmosphere that you created and your thoughtfulness towards me and my family. May God continue to bless you all!

reviews.text: I have nothing but praise for this law firm.I originally applied for my disability in 2021 and like most people was denied. So Ted appealed my case the second time and by this time I met Crystal from the office and she's just as sweet and helpful as Carole and a hearing was set for me November 2024 and between then and now a new law went into affect and long story short I had have a 2nd hearing May 2025..Let me back up in November 2024 when I met Ted he was so down to earth very supportive and encouraging as well..Fast forward to today June 26th 2025 I found out via phone from Carole that I was approved finally for my disability..I'd highly recommend Ted Smith and his amazing team Carole, Crystal and Atty...This has been a long battle and very exhausting mentally but Ted and his team never gave up on me or my case...So Ted, Carole and Crystal thank you again for accepting my case and for believing me and in me and my case....Y'all rock

reviews.text:
Dear Mr. Smith,

I hope this correspondence finds you well. I am writing regarding my case and to formally request copies of all documents related to it. I have not received responses to my previous emails from you and Barbie.

In order to comprehensively review and address my case, I require access to the following documents:
- Pleadings
- Motions
- Correspondence
- Discovery materials
- Any additional records pertinent to the case

Furthermore, I understand that the court has denied your motion to be removed from this case. I am aware that you are now filing a second motion to be removed. However, there are still responses that need to be filed on my behalf. Given this situation, it is essential that I receive a prompt response and any necessary actions moving forward, particularly regarding the original petition for intervention filed by another party. As you are still my attorney, I am unable to respond to this complaint independently and have less than two weeks to do so.

Please inform me of the preferred method for delivering these documents, whether it be via email attachment, secure online portal, or hard copies mailed to my address.

I appreciate your immediate attention to this matter and look forward to your prompt response. Additionally, please keep me informed of any further updates or developments related to this case.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Eugene Alexander
Very professional
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi, Tammie. We are thrilled to learn that you had a positive experience with us!

reviews.text:
UPDATED REVIEW (01MAY2024): After leaving the original review May 2023, Ms. Coe Selvaggio and Mr. Ted Smith took over our case and the difference was like night and day. They both kept an open form of communication with my husband and I and we truly appreciate the both of them! They made sure to keep us in the loop with the process and even ended up getting us a bouquet of chocolates once everything was finalized. I’m changing my original review of 1 star to 5 because of Ms. Selvaggio and Mr. Smith and how they handled our case. Thank you to the both of them for everything!

-3 April 2023: Originally went in to inquire about the process for my husband to adopt my son. The lawyer (Mr. Don Morehart) seemed knowledgeable about the process, so we decided to start the process and put down the upfront fee of $3500.
-19 April 2023: I reached out to inquire about where we were in the process, to which I was told that they were waiting on us to send in the “intake forms”. We were given a questionnaire to complete, but never instructed to email it back to them. I emailed the paralegal (Ms. Catherine Bailey) back and forth multiple times this day.
-24 April 2023: Emailed my husband’s and my completed intake forms to the paralegal.
-1 May 2023: Still had not heard from Ms. Bailey, so I emailed her again inquiring about the status of our case. Never did receive a response.
-3 May 2023: Called the front desk to inquire about the status of our case. I was informed that my paralegal was in a meeting and I would receive a call back. This did not happen.
-4 May 2023: Called again since I did not receive a call back the day prior. This is when I was informed that I had a new paralegal named Brittany (possibly a different spelling, not sure) and that she was “finishing up” the draft of the legal document that was going to be sent to my son’s biological father to terminate his rights.
-16 May 2023: I called the front desk inquiring, once again, about the status of everything. I was told the draft was sent to the lawyer for review and I would be receiving it soon. I asked about a time frame and one could not be provided. I voiced my concern that it had been nearly a month since we sent our completed intakes in and we still didn’t have an answer. Whomever I was speaking to at the front desk (can’t recall her name currently) told me that Brittany would be in touch and better communicate with us.

Today is May 24, 2023, exactly a month after we sent in our intakes with absolutely no idea what the status is of our case.  Our case is pretty cut and dry…my son’s biological father is willing to sign away his parental rights and have my husband adopt my son…but for whatever reason, it seems as if this law firm is quick to take your money but not actually assist you in any way.
I was in good hands from start to finish. A professional team that get things done. Makes time with clients to ensure you understand everything. 2 thumbs up!!!

Mr. Ted , Ms. Carole and Ms. Crystal were very professional, knowledgeable, respectful and, especially, very patience answering all of our questions and concerns, and guiding us throughout the whole process. Great results. Will highly recommend.

reviews.text: I genuinely have no word to describe how amazing this man is. From the beginning, when we 1st had our free consultation, he applied me with so much useful information even though money was extremely tight. He still guided me on what to do and what resources to use to begin the ugly road of divorce involving children. From his guidance, I was able to go ahead and file a response to my divorce petition on my own and submit it to court. Of course, I knew stuff was going to get even uglier with the  soon to be ex now that I had responded to his petition, but this also gave me enough time to get my finances in order. Perfect timing, the day I hired Jonathan Tanaka to represent me, I received notice for my next hearing the very next day. Jonathan Tanaka doesn't play, and he doesn't  waste any time when it comes to prepping a case. This man had 6 days till the hearing, and he helped me build such a strong case. Communication was amazing. Rather, it's through a portal, text, or call. This man is a blessing, he see you, he hears you and goes over and beyond to the point you feel like you know the law and understand every step he does. On the day of my hearing, we went back over everything, so when I walked in, I was confident, and boy was I. Jonathan Tanaka stayed 3 steps ahead of the other lawyer and kept his cool under pressure even though the other lawyer lost his cool. Again divorce is UGLY -sidenote (tell your lawyer everything no matter how small or big because Mr Tanaka was ready with the backfire.) Overall Jonathan Tanaka has been my lawyer for the past 4 months and Communication is still strong he will update you along the way and if there are questions he explains it to you in a way you will understand. He will always motivate you to ask questions if you don't understand. I know this is long, so let me wrap it up. Jonathan Tanaka is the lawyer you need and want, especially if you have kids. His prices are very affordable, and I have shopped around, but im telling you, you're going to want to hire him to represent you.  My case is still going, but I'm very confident in myself and Jonathan Tanaka that it will work in our favor. Okay, if you're still reading this call and scheduled an appointment and Jonathan, thank you so much for all of your hard work

reviews.text: As a top and trusted Google reviewer and recipient of the 2022 Austin Award in the Business Management Consultant category by the Austin Award Program, I, as a woman, Ph.D. learner, and professional, do not recommend Daniel Corbin as a choice of lawyer. I have left a previous 5 star review for another law firm (out-of-state); ergo, my consultation experience with Daniel Corbin to personally leave a 1-star review can be simply described as disastrous. Despite verbal and written receptionist confirmations and even forwarding such confirmation emails with uploaded attachments directly to Daniel Corbin to provide necessary documentation for my desired case, Daniel Corbin was unable to locate them leading Daniel Corbin to verbally become frustrated, with tone change, and demanding I seek services elsewhere before abruptly ending the call despite my further attempts to mitigate system or technological errors. Although I appreciate that my consultation from moved up from a Friday to a Thursday out of newly occurring availability for Daniel Corbin, Daniel Corbin lacks high levels of professional abilities in communication, cooperation, coordination, integrity, patience, tolerance, and understanding -- none of which, as part of the consultation, was a flattering experience for a professional woman, nonetheless for any professional or woman that may be seeking related services. I do not recommend Daniel Corbin.
Mr. Stapler you have our vote!!! Vote Stapler for Bell county DA.

Ashley Clapper and her team were instrumental in protecting my assets and my children during my divorce. They were extremely professional and empathetic and I can’t recommend them enough. I’m very thankful I had them on my team.

They blew through a $3,500 retainer without even getting to mediation. Then they said they needed another $3,000 or they wouldn't represent me in mediation. My husband and I settled and cancelled the law suit. I asked for my unused fees back. I was told I needed to wait a month to close their books. Then asked to have a check mailed to me. Two weeks passed and no check. I called and asked when it was mailed out. They said they forgot to mail it and I could pick it up. I have moved out of state, and gave my new address. It's been a week and still no check. Do not use this law firm. I was  bullied and pressured  to pay them exorbitant fees to represent me, and now that they owe me money they forget to send it.
Great experience. Very professional staff. This is my go to legal team.

I have done business with Corbin & Associates 3 or 4 times ,once to change my last will and testiment,twice for divorces ,and truth be told I will in the very near future I will be using his services again for ,you guessed it another divorce.I can honestly say that each time I had to use his services it was so professional, they made each experience affordable,and rather easy.I totally recommend Corbin & Associates if you are looking for an attorney that will work for you and truly will your best interest in hand .Thanks

I appreciate the dedication and hard work I received from Ms. Clapper and her legal team, helping me all the way through the process of fighting one of the hardest battles I have faced. You can’t put a price on your children. She is an admirable, compassionate attorney. There was always someone to help with any question or concerns. Lastly, The way her empathy was abundantly displayed  dealing with my case was more than noticed.

Satisfied Client.

I had an issue with a nationally-known alarm company.
Burglars not only broke into my business but ALSO stole the alarm's CPU (aka "brain") as well....as if that wasn't bad enough, the alarm company felt I should continue to pay their monthly monitoring fee--even though clearly--they can no longer perform the service for which they were charging. I attempted to speak with someone in management several times but was never able to get past customer service reps who threatened to trash my credit.
I scheduled my free consult with Corbin, Stapler & Clapper and decided to trust their firm to handle the matter for me.

One "Demand to Quit Billing" letter later, the (now) disreputable alarm company quickly agreed to stop all future billing and my problem was solved.

I would DEFINITELY use this firm again if the need ever arose.

Our attorney only returned calls when it was convenient, kept telling me "That's not relevant" when it absolutely was relevant at trial, and basically ignored all the information and resources I provided. I was known to have mental illness that required an ESA, and an epileptic. This lawyer allowed the opposing counsel to verbally beat up on me knowing all this as some sort of strategy. I left the courtroom in hysterical tears and seized. I was then told I "did good" because I was allowed to be put in this position. This isn't legal strategy, this was cruel and inhumane punishment.
The very reason we ended up losing the case were reasons that I had previous brought up, but were dismissed. I provided names and contact information for these professionals- I even had one who was just waiting to be contacted with a time to expect a video call to testify. None of this was used. Instead a sociopathic serial abuser was allowed to win (once again) at the cost of my family, our mental health, and my physical health.
To say that we are dissatisfied with the representation provided is an understatement. They do not care one bit about their clients or their cases.
The best in killeen.
Stop by for an information I received from 3rd party.  They were very informative and give me an advice that I can do.

reviews.ownerResponse: Honestly, hard to try to make it right with so little information.

reviews.text: Well.

I pray I never have to deal with this law firm again. I paid $3500 for a probate case that was delayed time and time again. First because the paralegal's child was sick, then the excuse was the lawyer's (Ashley Clapper)child broke an arm. Then when I would call for an update, I would have to reiterate all the information that I previously gave them all over again, and then be notified of documents they still need but refused to call me and tell me that they need them. Then I was told three months later that every time I or a family member calls to get an update, my account was being charged $15 per call. And then they had the audacity  to send me an email telling me my balance remaining on my account is $175 and that I need to keep that amount over $1500 in order to keep them as my attorney. I refuse to keep them as my attorney and I refuse to give them another dime!
I wanted to know more on legal affairs. I find it fascinated. but sometimes it can be a bit much or confusing when dealing with procedings Great Job team

I’m a first time landlord and I had important questions regarding damages that my tenant had made and how to handle them. Ashley Clapper was so helpful and nice. She made me feel so much better in how to handle the situation. I will definitely be using this law firm in the future with any issues that will occur.

If you need a lawyer for bell county. Steer clear of this law firm. After one year Mr Stapler didn’t even know which judge to file with. This was after filing with the wrong court 3 times. They will take your money then make excuses until you hire another lawyer.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sorry to see you go. We filed in the correct court, they did not accept the filing because another judge had done handled your case. Have your dad contact me any we will discuss refunding his money.  Good luck going forward.  I am sorry things in the court don’t move as fast as you want.

reviews.text: Excellent customer service. Will do future business with them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, glad we could help.

reviews.text: Ashley Clapper put me very at ease with my divorce case and did a fantastic job advising me during the mediation.  Talking to her was much like talking to a friend.  She was honest and kept my emotions in check so I could think straight.     The cost was also very reasonable when compared to what other attorneys were charging.  I am so glad that I chose to go with this firm and appreciate the recommendation from Mr. Corbin.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review. Glad we could help.
Thank you Mr. Miller. Let me know what we could do better.
Glad we could help.  Let me know what we could do better.

reviews.text: Was a great help,  seem very concerned about the case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review. We are concerned about every case.  We know it is your most important case and that makes it important to us.

reviews.text: Pleasant Attorney, on Wills...
reviews.ownerResponse: Glad we could help you.  We try to be pleasant on other cases too.

We strive to provide excellent client care and our focus is on understanding out client legal needs and goals.   If we did anything to upset you or If we have disappointed you in any way we certainly would like the opportunity to correct our mistakes and help you.  Please give us a call.  Thank you.

reviews.text: Awesome Lawyer! Awesome Team that works along beside of him!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your support.  We strive to help every person that seeks our legal help in a candid and caring way.  We have a reputation in the community of going the extra mile and really advocating for our clients.
Thank you Jay - it has been an awesome honor to serve our community and help so many people through very difficult situations for almost twenty years.

reviews.text: Amazing attorney and firm! I highly recommend.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your support - we love what we do and we love helping members of our community through difficult legal situations.  We don't stand for injustice, fraud, or inequities and strive to support and protect those that entrust their lives to us.

reviews.text: Good lawyer
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review  - we are bilingual and one of the only firms in the central Texas area that helps the Spanish community with a variety of legal issues.  Please let us know how we may improve your experience.

Thank you Leo for giving us the opportunity to help you.  We strive to connect individually with each person that comes to us for legal help and alleviate the stress of uncertainty.  We take our profession very seriously and we keep our clients informed on significant steps in the legal process.  Thank you for taking the time to voice your support.

reviews.text: I caught a case for domestic violence because of a dirty cop I was dating. All evidence was there that I did not touch him and he later changed his story. But because it was a domestic violence charge and I was arrested the state picked up the charges. Mr. Frank Camino worked very hard to get those charges dismissed. I have since broke up with that dirty lying cop and moved away only for him to do the exact same to several other women. They weren't so lucky, but because of my great lawyer and patience time and a little money (cheaper than I thought) my record is now being cleared and I can further my education and take care of my 6 kids (1thats autistic) and give them a great life! Thank you mr cimino for everything you have worked so hard for me and i will forever be grateful! I have since recommended several people to this firm and will continue to do so!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Misty - thank you for voicing your experience.  It was a very difficult situation and a very difficult case.  Luckily we were able to expose the truth and correct a huge misalignment in justice.  We are grateful and happy to have helped you..  Blessings to you and your precious family.

reviews.text: Does not deserve 1 star. It is almost four months since I have been in court and I still do not have a complete sign and stamped decree. He told me this would take only a few weeks to receive. Three times he has given me a timeline of when things should happen or will be done and three times he did not meet his expectations nor honor his word. I had to call or email 90% of the time to get an udpate on my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Powell - we are sorry to have disappointed you.  The court dockets are determined by the flow of cases that come through our court systems.  We have no control over that.  The legal process can be lengthily and tedious especially on contested matters.  Blessings to you and sorry we were not able to meet your expectations.

reviews.text: I hired Eric Stoebner and his firm to represent me in a probate case.  His professionalism, experience and expertise were a bridge in which we were able to built a professional working relationship.  He returned calls and emails in a timely matter.  Through the time frame of this case he worked hard to obtain the best results on the case.  After almost 3 years of court hearings and last minutes delays we walked away with a better deal than I expected.  I recommend Harrell, Stoebner and Villanueva, P.C. you will not find a better team.
One would expect an establishment to provide a services that’s advertised and available for a potential client but these folks here has smoke and mirrors with a closed door policy..

We are very grateful to have Mike Russell and  his team help us with  our case. They were very  thorough and professional and got the best results for us.   I would highly recommend anyone who needs help  to to geit from the temple law office.   The whole process was remarkable albeit lenghty. Thank you.
My lawyer (Jordan) and the paralegal (Mallory) did a very good job of always answering my questions and concerns. Things went better than anticipated.

I am incredibly grateful for the exceptional representation provided by this law firm. It has been a privilege working with Mallory Rasmussen and Jordan Hutchins, who delivered outstanding support when it mattered most. From the beginning, Mallory, my primary point of contact, treated me with the utmost care and respect.  She and Jordan made me feel like a valued member of their own family. They ensured that my questions were answered promptly and clearly and that any plan changes were communicated swiftly and efficiently.

Mallory and Jordan's genuine compassion and dedication truly set them apart. They consistently advocated for my best interests, even when I was unaware of my entitlements, and they never took shortcuts. Their strategic, steadfast approach and unwavering commitment to me led to a successful outcome on my behalf.

Having Mallory and Jordan on your side means being treated as a whole person and valued client. I felt genuinely cared for throughout the process. Thank you, Harrell, Stoebner, and Russell, for employing such talented and compassionate professionals as Mallory and Jordan.

most horrible phone service i have had to encounter , instead of help and advice , when asking for help and assistance in finding a attorney they  after explaining what i needed they  would not stay on topic , focused on saying and asking questions that had nothing to do with the reason for my call or concerns , not at all something i would trust the lively hood of my house or well being to.

I hired Brittany Darby to represent me for my nephews adoption case. Both her and Mallory were absolutely amazing! Answered all of my questions in a timely manner and made this an extremely easy process for me. I greatly appreciate you both! Thank you again
Nicole and Mallory did a great job on my case. Very knowledgeable, answered all my questions, and affordable service. I will use them again if I need to.  Thank you, Nicole, Mallory, and Sonia.

Nicole is absolutely amazing!!! Fought valiantly for my rights as a father. Trusted her from the very beginning. She brought results. I’m thankful to her because now I have sole custody of my son, we will never forget Mrs.Kramer. Thank you for bringing me my son!!!!!
Nicole is a hard-nosed woman and very knowledgeable about the laws in Texas. I would definitely recommend her for your needs. She's your fighter!

Brittany has been my attorney for years "due to delays with COVID" concerning my custody case.  I wasn't the easiest person to work with but she was always patient and helpful to me.  She fought hard for everything I wanted and won.  I just wanted to thank Brittany and her associates who helped our case.  I would highly recommend her, especially to any military fathers seeking custody of their child.  Thanks again Brittany!

My experience with Brittany Darby was great, helped me through everything I needed and always kept me up to date on what was going on. Definitely made a rough process as easy as possible. Great experience over all highly recommended.

Brittany Darby was a fantastic lawyer for our case.  She kept the cost as affordable as possible but did not lack in quality at all.  Brittany heard our concerns and worked with us to get to a resolve we needed.  Very very pleased!! Thank you Brittany and your team!

This law office is the absolute best in the area. I worked with Nicole, and she answered all of my questions and had a speedy response too. I would highly recommend for anyone who has a major family change. They are also very affordable and will get everything done very fast. Everywhere else I looked charged 3 times the amount and that was on average 7 different law firms in the central Texas area. Bottom line upfront they are THEE BEST!!!
Thank you so much Mallory and Brittany! Ya'll were so helpful!

She is caring, thorough, thoughtful, and fights for what is right. Her team works closely with her so even if she is with another client or in court you’re never left sitting without answers. Brittany takes her time to explain everything and makes sure her clients understand the full scope of what’s going on. I cannot recommend her and this law firm enough.
Brittany Darby is a very attentive and skilled attorney. I highly recommend for those seeking justice in the family court system.
Brttany and her staff were beyond helpful from day one. I wanted someone that would really listen to my concerns, she did just that. I would highly recommend Brittany and her team.

Brittany, along with the rest of her team, were great! They kept me in the loop, were very polite and courteous, and worked through my case very quickly. I would highly recommend them!
Thank you,
Frank

Very invested and genuine attorneys and people here. Made my life easier since they carried the weight of the job and very communicative eith ehat was going on. I never had to worry about what eas going on or nothing! Would highly recommend Brittany,  Nicole, and Mallory! Thank you again for taking this weight off my mid!

Ms. Darby was very helpful through the whole process. Took the time to listen, understand our perspective, and help us navigate the legal waters. I would recommend Brittany to anyone that is in need of help!
The young lady at the counter was very nice and helpful.
Ms. Darby handled my legal issues so quickly and did a great job. This office has the best communication and I would highly recommend Ms. Darby for anyone needing a great lawyer.

reviews.text: My experience with Brittany and her staff (Mallory) was amazing. They went out of their way to help me with my complicated divorce and problems I was experiencing through it. I would definitely use them again and I encourage others to as well. Thank you bunches Brittany and Mallory!!

My wife and I used their services in the adoption of our daughter. Nicole Cramer and her team were efficient, friendly, and had key relationships with the court that helped to keep the process moving forward. We are grateful for their service and skill and highly recommend them for anyone needing a trusted, family law attorney in Bell county.

Ms. Darby was very helpful in finalizing a lengthy divorce and made sure my needs were met to be able to get the time I needed with my children while this process was underway! I’m very pleased with the outcome and highly recommend her! I will definitely be using her for my next divorce!!!

Brittany Darby is amazing very helpful and took care of everything that was needed! Very professional and answers phone calls and emails in a timely manner. I suggest her for anything you may need a attorney for!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Peggy!!

reviews.text: I hired Nicole Cramer to handle our adoption case on the spot. I had consulted with other firms over the phone, but something just felt right about her and she seemed to know her stuff. Best decision I made! She was going to handle our conservatorship and adoption altogether and for one fee, thankfully we skipped the conservatorship and went straight to the adoption. She and her paralegal, Mallory, went above and beyond to make sure we had all the forms we needed and in such a timely manner. I hired this firm on March 22nd and the adoption was final on June 8th. This was our one and only experience with anything like this, and they made it so easy and words can't express how much I appreciate everything they did for our family!

I was pretty nervous about hiring a lawyer for my uncontested divorce because of the negative stories I've heard of but I am happy that this was not the case for my divorce. My lawyer, Nicole, and her paralegal, Mallory, were very professional and quick with this process. I would highly recommend this firm.
They dont return phonecalls when mandated to do so.

Nicole and her team are absolutely amazing! When it came to my husband adopting my son they made it so easy. They never made me feel like I was bothering them when I had random questions and would call. They got the adoption done quickly and it was completely stress free. Everyone is so professional and polite. The paralegal was very sweet, polite, and diligent. She made sure that I had everything filled out correctly and ready prior to the court date. It was very comforting to have this team represent my husband and I throughout this process. Now our adoption is complete and my family feels complete. Special thanks to Nicole, Brittany, Mallory, and Kristine. Y'all are the best. Thank you for helping us do what was best for our son!

Nicole Cramer is amazing! For over 5 years I have been trying to find an affordable lawyer that would take my case for custody of my older two. Not only did she take it she was honest with me about expectations and in less than a year I now have my kids with me full time! Thank you Nicole
Always meets our legal needs.

Very punctual and honest overall amazing best accident attorney I ever had. Absolutely Amazing I was told I was going to get one amount and I actually got more. Thank you Tad and Anne and to all that was on my case. Y'all are so kind and considerate even when the insurance was giving you hell ya'll triumphed I definitely recommend this law firm. They cover all of texas and are worth the travel. If I could I would give them 10 ☆'s
Excellent firm.

We hired Brittany Darby for a custody case for our grandchildren.  Brittany is the best lawyer anyone could hope for. I highly recommend her and her firm.  Everyone is very professional and their rates are reasonable.  We had to hire another firm to represent our daughter and they charged more than three times as much for terrible service.  In fact, we even received a refund from Brittany's firm.
Great group of attorneys

So I swore I would stay quiet and just let it ride. But since I keep being charged (I will include screenshots, it won't let me add pictures) its time I tell my story.

Please do not use Brett Pritchard Law Firm. I had a total of 3 different lawyers (none of which represented me during my final mediation) and I only ever met with 1 of them. The lawyer who did represent me during my mediation convinced me it was best not to go for back child support as I would more than likely lose and the judge wouldn't agree. I just received a message asking for my address (even though they have it on file) and because I responded I was charged $15. I am being charged different amounts for different things and no one has reached out or spoken to me since December 23rd which is when I was told they were closing my file (for the 2nd time). October 20th 2025 was when it was 1st mentioned they were closing my file. It was $5000 just to retain them and then another $1200 just to go to mediation, which was not explained to me up front. I knew this could cost a little bit of money but not this much. I have paid a grand total of: 12,081.71 so far and I still owe them $167.50 and my case is still not closed even though I have not heard a word from this Firm since December like I mentioned.

I really just want to make people aware of the situation and bring light to this. I wish I would have gone somewhere else. The best thing I got from this was being made custodial parent.

I’ve known this team professionally for years and have always been impressed by their integrity, knowledge, and dedication to helping their clients. They genuinely care about the people they serve and work hard to get the best outcomes possible

I am not a client of BH Law Firm — but I truly wish I had been.

I was in a custody battle from 2019 until February 2026. Over those seven years, I went through three attorneys. In 2024, I had the opportunity to hire BH Law Firm, but I decided against it because I thought their retainer was too high. Instead, I hired Carlson Law Firm.

The attorney I hired billed at $400 per hour. What started as a $7,000 retainer ultimately cost me nearly $60,000.

More painful than the money was how I felt at trial. I didn’t feel strategically protected. The focus seemed to be on basic, surface-level issues — things I believe I could have handled myself. When you’re paying $400 an hour, you expect preparation, advocacy, and someone willing to fight when it matters most. That wasn’t my experience.

Recently, after being laid off and needing to modify child support, I reached out to BH Law Firm again. Jeffrey set up a Zoom consultation. Within minutes, he said Brett was off that day — but he immediately called him on his cell phone so we could all speak.

They spent over an hour with me. Free consultation. No pressure. No sales tactics. Just clear, thoughtful guidance about what I should and shouldn’t do.

After seven years of litigation, that level of care honestly hit me emotionally. For the first time in a long time, I felt like someone actually cared about me — not just billable hours.

I’m not their client. I gain nothing from writing this. I simply want someone else going through a custody case to pause and think carefully before choosing representation based only on the retainer amount. I learned the hard way that the cheaper option upfront can cost far more in the end.

If you’re facing a family law matter, at least speak with BH Law Firm before deciding. I wish I had.

This firm has been a nightmare to work with. I was a referral and I can’t believe the headache and frustration they have caused me. I can’t imagine how someone who isn’t a referral would be treated.

In my initial consultation with one of the attorneys I was told for an uncontested divorce it would be $2500 to get it all done. After the most recent invoice it is now totaling over $4300.

After initially providing the terms of our divorce it took 84 days to receive the first draft of the final decree, almost all of which was fairly basic as we had no special requests or terms. HOWEVER they messed up a phone number of all things. We did request one change that ended up being a nightmare in the long run to get them to updated.

On 10/21/25 I was informed that I had a call scheduled with my attorney, Mr. Cavazos, on 10/30. I was informed the call could happen any time throughout the day so all day I made sure I was not busy so I could take this call. I did not receive said call. On 11/3 I finally received a call from my attorney at 6PM with no warning. Since I was in the store he called me back after I was able to get to my car. We talked about the changes I needed and he said he would have it done by the end of the week, or I would hear from him by then.

On 11/10/25, after not hearing from my attorney, like he said I would, an incorrect version of the final decree was provided to me. In order to speed the process along I provided the exact wording I needed within the document (two sentences). To which I was met with silence.

On 12/15/25, after still receiving no changes to my documents, I requested to meet with Mr. Pritchard himself to express my displeasure with the service I was receiving as I was promised this entire process would be speedy.

Finally on 12/17/25 I received the properly updated version of my documents. We had these documents notarized and returned within the week.

I had my call with Mr. Pritchard where he informed me that this entire process should’ve taken 90 days instead of the over 200 it ended up taking. I also learned that he was the one who made the requested changes to the final version of the decree that I had been waiting for.

After finally getting a hearing date scheduled, days before court, my attorney added changes to my final decree that would have resulted in the divorce being contested. I did not ask for or want these changes. I had to demand to speak to my attorney and get him on the phone after trying repeatedly. After arguing with him for a few minutes, he agreed to drop this version of the final decree.

Additionally, after receiving no updates for so long, I continually check in requesting for any status update to try to get some momentum on the last remaining changes to the documents. These communications cost $30 every time. $15 to send a message and $15 to have it reviewed and responded to. After complaining about this they “graciously“ offered to drop the fee for sending messages but it still cost $15 for their response.

My divorce has been final for over a month and I am continuing to receive invoices with no clear description of charges while being told by the billing department that they are “valid” and if I would only download the invoice, which I did before reaching out, I could see why. Yet the invoice has no description of the charges.

As someone who’s is very against the use of AI, I would recommend to anyone that they take their chances with ChatGPT generating their final decree and figuring out the court system themselves rather than retain this firm. I worry for anyone that has retained them that is not a referral.

(Edited to remove some personal information)

This law firm has a dedicated staff that is quick to assist and provide guidance on your case.  You may not like the end result, but it is definitely not a lack of effort on Pritchard's law firm.  I highly recommend hiring this team to fight your case!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Robert! We are so glad we could help!

reviews.text: best lawyer i could have ever asked for . mr Pritchard handled my divorce for me. lets say I walked away with everything. I got custody of my son, she didn't get any of my military benefits, the only thing she got was her clothes. thank you for helping give me and my son the life we have enjoyed.

After my divorce started I had a 3,000 dollar purse to help my divorce be finished. Uncontested, no shared property, just wanting custody. This company amd Mr.Sarkoya failed to even handle the simple task of getting an initial hearing in place properly to get a standard custody order in place cause my daughter was being held away from my visitation. I want more than 1 night with my daughter. Their gross misuse of fund, professionalism and overall pass the blame game is beyond irritable. If you wanna waste your money come here cause now I got a loan to pay off and a case that they are refusing to withdraw from cause they want another 4,000. Even being told I do not want their services any longer just refer me to billing. Its beyond a joke at this point. Then when telling them I dont want them on my case please stop anything and everything and remove themselves I get another bill for 20$.

They are so welcoming, kind and  informative! Thank you Mr P for taking the time out of your day to hear our concerns! There was a level of transparency and genuine attentiveness from the moment we arrived for our appt. We appreciate yall!
Amazing people,polite,caring and professional

BEWARE: This law firm did nothing that they said they would besides take our money - we were charged $1,396 for them to not even file that we were disputing, they did not get served on our behalf, they transferred us to a different lawyer without even telling us - I don’t recommend this office to anyone looking for a professional. Update: still haven’t received $604 refund
Update #2: WOW - they charged $25 for “time entry” on December 1st when they haven’t done ANYTHING FOR US PERIOD but haven’t even spoke to us in OVER A MONTH -

Please find someone else rather than this office! They quote you one thing and you end up paying alot more. I kept getting reschedule and charged 800 to 2000 each month until I finally told them I cannot continue to pay you after I paid the 7k for my case. They made me take a plea deal when I did all the research for them with police report, witnesse, and etc. I only took the deal because it was no jail time and supposedly 1 year probation which turn into 2 years, period. I have no criminal record/history  for nearly 40+ years
Would not even meet to discuss representation.

Hands down the best service that you will ever receive. This firm will give you every single last avenue that you can approach whatever you are going through. Not only do they treat you with respect and compassion they also treat you as part of the family. I could not have asked for more with the services provided and the relation ships that have been built here. Forever grateful for the hard working staff and the incredible want and desire they have to ensure that your freedoms are not infringed upon. Again hands down the best.

this place has got to be a joke , literally paid 5k just to be lied too , and to find out my attorney is withdrawing from my case for literally no reason ive spoken to her twice .. asked several times for her to work a settlement w OPC nothing. they would message me every single time the OPC would email them but never email OPC back in regards to my concerns.
Wonderful interactions, knowledgeable staff and empathetic.
These guys are outstanding. If you have a problem or just need some advice these are the folks you want to talk to. Very professional and straight forward.
Horrible communication with their clients, not interested in your best interest, would not recommend.
These guys are awesome.
Wonderful team. Genuinely care about their clients.

This law firm is amazing! Even though I was a nervous reck and had no idea what I was going Rachel M. Was there to walk me through every step of the way always replied back in a timely manner explained everything I needed to know and walked me through all my options and more. I was told that it wasn’t going to be problem since I had filed most of the paperwork already and his contact information was filed with the court and it was on him to keep it updated. Fast forward to 2 days after I pay the retainer…. I get asked for his updated information and when I let the paralegal know that this was all discussed prior to taking me on as a client she responded by telling me that if I can’t get it then we will now have to change it to filing contested which will cost me a lot more money. WHO SENDS A DOMESTIC VIOLENCE VICTIM ON A HUNT FOR THEIR ABUSER???!!! Nevertheless, I get them the information and things proceed. I showed up for the court date even though they told me I didn’t have to, but my attorney didn’t (I’m sure they weren’t happy I went because now they can’t bill me for the attorneys court time). He called later to say he got busy with another case. I let him know I got all the paperwork I needed while I was up there and that they could go ahead and close the case. They have continued charging me here and there for random things even though my court date was 9 months ago and this should have been closed out and the remainder of my retainer returned as promised. They charge me $30 every time I email them to ask them why it’s still open, so I guess they are just hoping to find a way to bill it all so they don’t have to return any. There is no integrity in this firm. WOULD NOT RECOMMEND

A Client's Perspective on a Legal Firm's Services
I am writing to share my experience with a recent legal engagement. The firm was retained for my divorce proceedings, and the total cost incurred exceeded $7,000. Despite this, the case never proceeded to court.
The communication from the firm was consistently inadequate, which created significant challenges throughout the process. For instance, mediation was recommended in December, but the session was not scheduled for nearly three months. This delay, along with the continuous need for additional funds, made the experience particularly difficult.
Based on my personal experience, I cannot recommend this firm for divorce-related legal services.

Where to begin? I had heard about the law office of Brett H. Pritchard through radio advertisements. I never really gave much thought to needing their services. Until I did.

At the time I was about to go through a divorce. I didn't know where to start or what will happen. Even though I myself have guided my soldiers through the divorce process, while I was Active-Duty in the Army. I knew a little bit of what to expect, but not the whole process. I made my appointment by walking in and was immediately greeted by the young ladies at the intake window. They walked me through what would happen from that day on. In general terms only. Then, I filled out intake forms provided by the law firm. The ladies were very helpful and accommodating. Next, I sat down with a lawyer who walked me through every step of the divorce process. When I say every step, I mean every step. The lawyer I spoke with also answered all of my "what if" questions, was super patient, and actually asked me about myself. He definitely made it feel like I was his top priority. I'm pretty sure this law firm has seen their share of divorce cases from Active-Duty, veteran, and retired personnel. Which was both a relief and kind of sad. But I digress. Every step of the way, everyone who worked with me kept me informed, and communicated everything that needed to be done, or what needed to happen. My particular case was an easy case, and everyone who worked with me made the process stress free and easy. I felt like I was very well taken care of by the law office of Brett H. Pritchard and would recommend them to anyone who needs legal assistance. Even when there was a hiccup that happened on the day of my court date, which was out of anyone's control, the lawyers at this law firm maintained a high level of professionalism and fixed the problem immediately. Again, I highly recommend this law firm.

I have requested appointments only for them to be dropped or for them to not be followed through with. ***WARNING!!! MUST READ BEFORE CONSIDERING TISDALE!!!***

Initially I gave a one star, and then Mr Tisdale called me to try to smooth things over bribing me to remove it. But now it's back and let me tell you why.

We paid over $15,000 for a custody battle and he did nothing. Tons of negligence from his office led to a prolonged traumatic experience and additional money. Information & EVIDENCE I gave them that were very important to the case were never brought to anybody's attention. Mr Tisdale was the first person to talk to me but his paralegals block you in the future from ever reaching out to him. I requested over & over to talk with him or see him personally with his paralegal telling me no. Not ever meeting before court. Not even a 5 min meeting in the hall. Nothing.

AS MANY OTHER REVIEWS HAVE MENTIONED...

In court, Mr Tisdale didn't know anything he was talking about. Clearly demonstrating that he never read anything w/ important information for his argument. He even had to whisper to me in court for an answer the judge frustratingly asked him that he should have known!

He was a very timid and weak. I have never seen someone so unprepared. You could tell he was nervous and the reason why he was nervous is because he didn't know my story which he should have known. He never saw evidence even though I provided it. I should have represented myself, truly.

So anyway, he contacted me and apologized for all of that and offered not only me a job for $3,000 a month but he also offered pro bono with my foreclosure because we stopped paying our mortgage payments in order to pay Mr Tisdale to get my daughter back.

In exchange to remove my one star review, he tried saying he'd do a bankruptcy file to stall to allow us to sell it. which equaled about $4k. And mentioned helping finalize the adoption between my daughter and her stepfather. He said he usually does these for $2k anyway and asked if those 2 things would suffice the money that was wasted purely by Heather. Like a wash.

I was trying to give him the benefit of the doubt that he had no idea and Heather was the one that did MOST malpractice type stuff. But at the same time I will say that he is responsible for making sure he knows what he's talking about before going in. AND HE SHOULD HAVE MET WITH ME BEFORE GOING INTO COURT. Which would have prevented all this. Again another common complaint you could see on other reviews.

Months went by and I started getting bills. I responded a few times saying that Mr Tisdale said that this would be pro bono in exchange for mess ups that costed me money, which he did say, and the emails stopped.

But then it came back again a few months later, so I told them that I was getting frustrated with these constant tries to get me to pay or if I didn't they would dismiss me as a client...

So Mr Tisdale reaches out and lets me know that he never agreed to those things, but he understands why I could have misunderstood it, which is complete BS. I think he forgot about our conversation and everything that was wrong. Or he's a crook? I think he forgot I can put my review back if he pulls his bribe offer.

So after some consultations with other local attorneys in the area, my review is back. And here to stay.

Mr Tisdale, the trauma and pain that was caused by your firm. Has affected us still to this day. I still have night terrors, won't leave my bed for weeks, severe depression/anxiety... And I have this all heavily documented for years. Including guardian ad litem and the judge! Yes we're going after them too. I also have dozens of emails and ironclad proof of negligence and damage.

I had consultations w/ 3 different attorneys. Every single one said I have a solid case against all of you.

Before you try striking another deal w/ me to take this down, I'd be willing to consider if a refund of most my money. Until then, My TRUTHFUL review will remain right here along w/ future consequences like malpractice lawsuit and report to the BAR. ✌️

reviews.text: DO NOT USE THIS LAW FIRM TO REPRESENT YOU FOR BANKRUPTCY! You will regret it. They literally caused my sister to lose her home! They failed to fight for her in court. They stopped paying for her home in the bankruptcy the main reason she got in the bankruptcy. Then he shows up to court, no paperwork in hand, late, wrinkled, no fight no purpose.RUN!
reviews.ownerResponse: It took awhile to figure out who this was, because we haven’t had a client lose a home in years. We still haven’t. The client’s home was saved not once, not twice, but three times from bankruptcy. This person caused problems in the case because, without her knowledge, this person added our client to her home. We had to have her come to court. We successfully salvaged her discharge in her prior bankruptcy and the client is selling her home, instead of losing it to foreclosure. Also, we don’t pay the mortgage, the client and the trustee do.

Keiko is an excellent lawyer! I strongly recommend her. You definitely want her on your team!

I had an appointment yesterday with her at 4:00pm and I call them at 3:55pm to start my consultation to be potential client I was on hold for 19 minutes had to hang up call back then she called me back,then finally got to her and she tried to argue that I was not on hold for that long, explain my situation to her and had the feeling that she just didn't care about it after I paid $50.00 consultation fee over the phone would not recommend if they can't be on time for a consultation I can't imagine for the real time, if I hire her,no thank you she is off my list.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your complaint publicly and privately.  You are heard! I sincerely apologize for being 14 minutes behind! It's hard to estimate each appointment and I ran over.  I certainly did not want you to feel as if I was arguing with you at all but when you said you were on hold 30 minutes that was untrue.  I do wish you the best sir! Blessings!

reviews.text: Can’t speak to legal services yet, but Tiana, the front office admin was top-tier. That kind of professionalism sets the tone.

I hired her in 2012 just before I was deployed, needing to adjust my child support due to a significant pay cut with my new job. Her paralegal assured me they could handle the paperwork in a week, so I paid the $1,000 retainer. However, a week passed with no paperwork, then two weeks, and then three. I even went to their office since they never answered the phone, but when I got there, Keiko raised an eyebrow and asked if I had an appointment. Ultimately, I didn’t get the paperwork sorted before my deployment, which meant my new wife had to deliver the child support documents to my ex-wife—needless to say, that didn’t go well.  I wasted $1000 for nothing.

We are truly thankful for all that Keiko Griffin Anderson has done for our family. She went above and beyond in handling our child support case, providing not only expert legal knowledge but also a level of care and compassion that made a difficult situation much easier to navigate. Keiko was quick to take action, always responsive, and incredibly helpful throughout the entire process. She moved with kindness, grace, and professionalism every step of the way. Her dedication and efficiency gave us peace of mind, and we are deeply grateful for her support.

I’ve had the pleasure of knowing and having Keiko Anderson work for my case, and I can say without hesitation that she is one of the most hardworking, compassionate, and skilled family law attorneys I’ve ever encountered. With over 22 years of experience in the legal field myself, I’ve seen many attorneys come and go — but Keiko stands out in every way that matters.

Keiko brings a rare combination of legal knowledge, emotional intelligence, and relentless dedication to her clients. Family law can be emotionally charged and incredibly complex, yet she approaches every case with both the sensitivity it requires and the fierce advocacy her clients deserve. Whether it’s a custody matter, divorce, or other family law issue, she never loses sight of what’s most important: protecting her client’s rights and well-being, especially when children are involved.

What impresses me most is her work ethic. I’ve personally seen Keiko working late into the evenings and putting in hours on weekends — not because she has to, but because she genuinely cares. She takes the time to listen, to prepare, and to make sure no detail is overlooked. Her clients are never just a case file to her; they are real people going through difficult transitions, and she treats them with the utmost respect and compassion.

If you are looking for an attorney who will fight for you with integrity, intelligence, and heart, I wholeheartedly recommend Keiko Anderson. She is the kind of advocate you want on your side, and the kind of professional we need more of in this field.

I recently had the pleasure of working with Keiko who truly stands out in her field. With 22 years of experience, her expertise is evident in every interaction. From the very beginning, she demonstrated a deep understanding of family law and a genuine passion to helping me navigate through challenging times.

What impressed me the most was her unwavering commitment to my case. She consistently went above and beyond, dedicating her weekends and late nights to ensure all my questions were answered and my concerns addressed. It was clear that she genuinely cared about my well-being and the outcomes of my situation. Her approachable demeanor made it easy for me to reach out whenever I needed guidance, and she always responded promptly, making me feel valued as a client.

Her skill set is remarkable; she not only possesses extensive knowledge of the law but also has a unique ability to communicate complex legal concepts in a way that is easy to understand. This made the entire process much less daunting for me. I am incredibly grateful for her hard work, dedication, and the personal touch she brought to my case. I highly recommend her to anyone seeking a family lawyer who is not only skilled but also truly cares about her clients.

If I could rate this firm lower than one star, I would. This law firm exhibits a disturbing lack of professionalism and ethical standards. Keiko and her paralegal are frequently unavailable, often citing "vacations," and fail to respond to clients, opposing counsel, or even mediators. They have a troubling reputation for filing motions without consulting their clients or obtaining their consent. Despite multiple attempts to reach them via phone, text, and email, communication is virtually non-existent.
In many instances, motions are filed without the client’s knowledge, seemingly as a strategy to increase fees. The firm swiftly issues billing after submitting these motions, which raises significant concerns. Furthermore, they misrepresent the status of cases to opposing counsel, their own clients, and mediators, creating false impressions of non-responsiveness or lack of agreement.
Keiko appears to prioritize financial gain over the best interests of her clients, displaying a clear disregard for ethical conduct. This firm’s actions are widely recognized within Bell County Courts as unethical. Given their conduct, I believe Keiko’s legal license should be thoroughly reviewed, as she should not be allowed to practice law.
For anyone who has worked with this firm, I strongly recommend requesting a full, detailed invoice to ensure transparency regarding charges. I suspect that unauthorized charges may be present. A formal complaint will be filed with the Bar Association regarding these practices.

Ms. Griffin was recommended by a few people we know. Those people were so right! She was the right attorney for getting guardianship of our grandchildren.

Her knowledge in this area of law is obvious. She led the negotiations to a successful outcome. She treated us like real people and not "just another client". She understood this was a difficult situation and that we were only looking out for our grandkids. Ms. Griffin's interactions with opposing counsel were professional and effective. We would definitely recommend her to others.
Ms. Griffin assisted my parents and I on a custody case for my children against my ex husband. I am very happy with the results. My children are safe because of her.
Ms Griffin’s office was so professional and we had a great outcome in our case. She was  so genuine and understanding of our needs. I would highly recommend her services.

She is very knowledgeable and professional. Was able to refer me to other resources and explained things thoroughly.

I called and spoke with Ms. Keiko Griffin today, and got no help whatsoever. She automatically sided with the mother of my child. Didn’t offer any advice, was very short and I felt like I was being rushed off the phone. Do not hire her as your lawyer. Especially if you are a man, she will side with the female. Very rude lady. Do not hire.

I would like to express my gratitude to Keiko and her team.  Our objective was to fight a lockdown in Bell County. Keiko Griffin is absolutely amazing! She's very attentive, detailed, and knowledgeable. You don't ever want to have to have an attorney, but if I ever do again, it will be Keiko Griffin.

Keiko Griffin assisted my husband and I with a child support case against another party in another state that we would have other wise not even known the first step to officially establish child support. The customer service was significantly impactful; in that we felt welcomed to ask any and all questions that were thoroughly answered.
We were serviced the same week we submitted our request for the consultation. I highly recommend this office.

I sat next to Keiko Griffin for 4.5 hours while she defended me against my ex husbands false claims and attempt to take custody of my daughter. I watched as his lawyer submitted new document after new document into “evidence” and tried his hardest to throw Mrs. Griffin off her game but she didn’t flinch not even once. She knew exactly what questions to ask and when it would be better to stay quiet and let them sink themselves. She filled my witness list with professionals from all aspects of my life and left no room for questions as to which one of us was telling the truth and where my daughter would benefit most while being raised. I see these reviews about the cost that comes with hiring Mrs. Griffin and I’m here to tell you, pay the money! She is proof of you get what you pay for and I am endlessly thankful for the advice, guidance and courage she gave me in what felt like one of the scariest moments in my adult life.

I was a witness in a case represented by Keiko. She is not only professional and knowledgeable with 20+ years of experience, but also is so thorough and supportive through the entire process. Keiko Griffin is an amazing lawyer ! She was very professional and cared deeply about her client and the case. She was friendly yet professional.  I would recommend her to everyone

Not only did she give me some advice about an upcoming case against my ex husband but she didn’t charge me. She was really being more of a friend and I had just met her. This was the worst experience ever.  I called for a consultation. Paid $50.  Which was fine. But she was very short. Had no empathy and was very rude. I had no clue of how divorce goes. 10/10 recommend that she represents your opposing party - she was so busy trying to sneak in things no one cared about that she forgot all about a ton of money. I didn’t hire her, but I’m glad he did! Downfall for her opposition is that she is as flaky as they come and will drag everything out.

I remember meeting Ms. Griffin back in 2015. I was young and afraid and fighting a case, both criminal and cps. She helped me with my rights to my son. reviews.ownerResponse: I’m sorry for your frustration. It is a higher price when cases get contested and that upsets people who wish the other side would agree. I totally understand! I am happy to help anyone but there are levels of complexity that require more funds. Best wishes. Keiko

reviews.text: Keiko & her team are true saviors. Their guidance, care & professionalism during a difficult time were incredible. I will forever refer anyone in need of legal services to her team.

Ms. Keiko and her law firm was payed almost 10,000 for a child support case that never got resolved. I contacted the law office in March of 2023 to cancel service because they amount I was paying to fight a CS case I could just use to take care of my child. The law office agreed to a payment plan of $250 every Monday to pay off the final $1608.52 on March 17th, 2023. I made the final payoff to that payment plan May 12,2023. I have emails and receipts of everything. I’ve been trying to call the office and figure out how they feel I owe them $9400 and they won’t even tell me how or explain the non existent charges.

Here were are January 25th, 2024 I receive a notification that my credit score had a change opened the Experian app at they have sent to collection a bill of 9,375.90 and my scored had now dropped for 785 to 603.

If I could give 0 stars I would. I never ever began receiving child support for my daughter after paying her up to $10,000 for services. & now she is causing more problems in my life than my sperm donor has.

Your job as a lawyer is suppose to be to help those who come to you, not cause problems in their life.l and definitely not try take from them money you do not deserve from services that were cancelled.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Ms. Harris! You did not show up for your court hearings but the judge awarded you thousands of dollars in attorney’s fees after my argument for you despite the fact that you stopped paying me. We won! Keiko

reviews.text: I've really appreciated the assistance and care Ms Wiley has shown for my dad. Consistent follow up, thoughtful interactions, and honoring my dad's attorney client privilege. Only issue we've had is that appointments occasionally get shifted for court appearances

I had a consult in January with Mrs. Wiley and her Office Manager Mary. The consult seemed to go well and I asked if I could have a couple weeks to speak with my family and get back with them. Once I tried to get back in touch I would leave voicemails and not get returned calls, when someone did answer the phone they stated that the attorney Mrs. Wiley is out of the office for a week or week and a half. I finally had to go up to the office since it had been roughly a month and half without hearing anything. When I got to the office it was the same story oh Mrs. Wiley is out of the office for a week and half well have to get back to you in a couple weeks that never happened so I called several times before getting someone on the phone and they didn't even know what was going on the paralegal was out of the office and Mrs. Wiley was in a meeting. The next day I finally got a call only to be told that Mrs. Wiley was not comfortable taking on my case. This was known weeks ago I don't understand why they wasted my time by giving me the run around instead of just letting me know they didn't want to take the case. This whole experience was unprofessional.

Best office best experience and best services in love this place thank you Mr chan

I hired this lawyer during one of the most stressful times of my life and was deeply disappointed by how my situation was handled. I had an active case in a California court, but due to unavoidable circumstances, I had to move to Texas.

At a time when I needed legal support the most, I was left without representation. This felt extremely unprofessional and dismissive, especially given the seriousness of my situation.

Based on my experience, I would strongly advise others to be cautious. If you are dealing with time sensitive or complex legal matters, this may not be the right place. Specifically, my experience with Mr. Chan Park was very disappointing.

We chose this attorney for my mother-in-law's green card application.  Attorney Park was very helpful from start to finish.  He always promptly answered any questions I or my family had.
